sourcesContent:
import '../styles/hero.css' /* ─── Hero ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Layout (desktop): two columns — left text / right profile image Features • Animated "available" badge • Gradient name + role line • CTA buttons + social icon row • Rotating dashed profile ring • Floating info badges on profile • 4-stat summary bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* ---- Replace these text values with your own ---- */ const DATA = { greeting: 'Available for Work', name: 'Your Name', role: 'Full-Stack Web Developer', roleEmphasis:'Full-Stack', description: `A passionate Computer Science student building clean, functional, and user-friendly web applications. I turn ideas into production-ready full-stack experiences.`, stats: [ { number: '10+', label: 'Projects Built' }, { number: '5+', label: 'Technologies' }, { number: '2+', label: 'Years Learning' }, { number: '3+', label: 'Certifications' }, ], socials: [ { label: 'GitHub', href: 'https://github.com/yourusername', svg: ( ), }, { label: 'LinkedIn', href: 'https://linkedin.com/in/yourname', svg: ( ), }, { label: 'Twitter / X', href: 'https://twitter.com/yourhandle', svg: ( ), }, ], } const ArrowIcon = () => ( ) const UserIcon = () => ( ) /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */ const Hero = () => (
{/* subtle dot-grid bg */}
{/* glow blob top-right */}
{/* ── Main two-column layout ── */}
{/* Left: text */}
{/* "Available" badge */}
{DATA.greeting}

Hi, I'm {DATA.name}

I build  {DATA.roleEmphasis}  Web Apps

{DATA.description}

{/* CTA Buttons */}
View Projects Get In Touch
{/* Social icons */}
Find me on
{DATA.socials.map(s => ( {s.svg} ))}
{/* Right: profile visual */}
{/* spinning dashed ring */}
{/* avatar circle */}
{/* REPLACE the div below with: */}
{/* floating info chips */}
🎓 CS Student
⚡ Open to Work
{/* ── Stats bar ── */}
{DATA.stats.map(s => (
{s.number} {s.label}
))}
) export default Hero
